response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and developer tooling, plus genuine interest in IDEs (notably C/C++ work on NI LabWindows/CVI). However, the role demands deep JVM, Java/Kotlin, and Spring ecosystem expertise, and the resume shows only Java listed as a general skill with no substantial recent Spring, Kotlin, Hibernate, or Quarkus experience. Primary stacks are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which do not align with enterprise JVM tooling work.
strengths: Prior IDE development experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Strong track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Solid software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Hibernate, or Quarkus experience
Kotlin is absent from skills and work history
Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node and DLang, not JVM
